add_question_step1: Add Question {num} Form: {form} Step 1/3: What is the question? Send the question text now:
confirm_delete: Delete Form? {name} This will also delete all {count} response(s). This cannot be undone.
edit_q_text_title: Edit Question Text Current: {text} Send the new question text:
edit_questions_title: Edit Questions Form: {name} Tap a question to edit or delete it:
effect_picker_title: {label} Effect Choose an effect to play when this message is sent to subscribers:
invalid_state_toast: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again.
list_empty_detail:
{e_form_open} Forms No forms created yet. Forms let your subscribers answer questions step by step — their replies are saved for you to review.
Once you create a form, launch it from: • A menu button — set the button action to Launch Form • A keyword trigger — attach the form to any keyword reply • A sequence step — send it as part of an automated flow Tap Create New Form below to get started.
list_header:
{e_form_open} Forms Your forms ({count}): Tap a form to manage its questions, view responses, and export data.
{e_light_bulb} Launch any form from a menu button, keyword trigger, or sequence step.
name_too_short2: Name is too short. Please try again.
question_options_step: Type: {icon} {label} Step 3a/3: Enter the options Send each option on a new line. Separate options on the same row using |. Example: Yes | No Maybe Small | Medium | Large Max 10 options total.
question_required_step: Type: {icon} {label} Step 3/3: Is this question required? If required, the subscriber cannot skip it.
reorder_title: Reorder Questions Form: {name} Use {e_up_arrow} / {e_down_arrow} to move questions:
responses_empty_detail:
Responses Form: {name} No responses yet.
Responses arrive when subscribers fill out this form via a menu button or keyword trigger. Make sure the form is attached to a button or keyword your subscribers can reach — then share it with them to start collecting answers.
responses_list_title: Responses ({count}) Form: {name} Tap a response to view details:
setting_prompt_thankyou: Enter the new thank-you message (shown after submission). Supports bold, italic, custom emoji, and macros like %mention%, %firstname%.
setting_prompt_welcome: Enter the new welcome message (shown before the first question). Supports bold, italic, custom emoji, and macros like %mention%, %firstname%.
settings_title:
Form Settings {name} Welcome message: {welcome} Welcome effect: {welcome_effect} Thank-you message: {thankyou} Thank-you effect: {thankyou_effect} Allow multiple submissions: {multi}
Multi-submit ON: subscribers can fill this out more than once. Multi-submit OFF: each subscriber can only submit once.
wizard_created:
{e_party} Form Created! {name} is ready. Add your questions below, then launch the form from a menu button or keyword trigger.
Tip: You need at least one question before subscribers can fill it out.
wizard_name_set: Name set: {name} Step 2/3: Welcome message This message is shown to subscribers before the first question. Supports bold, italic, custom emoji, and macros like %mention% or %firstname%. Send a welcome message, or tap Skip to use none:
wizard_skip_to_thankyou: Step 3/3: Thank-you message This message is shown after the subscriber submits the form. Supports bold, italic, custom emoji, and macros like %mention% or %firstname%. Send a thank-you message, or tap Skip:
wizard_step1: Create New Form Step 1/3: What should this form be called? Examples: • Contact Request • Customer Survey • Order Form Send the form name now:
